节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The Buffer class is a global type for dealing with binary data directly. It can be constructed in a variety of ways.
This parameter specifies the type of a common encoding format.
TypedArray inherits the features and methods of Int8Array
Creates and initializes a Buffer instance of the specified length. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } size - Size of the Buffer instance to create, in bytes.
@param { string | Buffer | number } [fill] - Value to be filled in the buffer. The default value is 0.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when fill is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.
@returns { Buffer } Return a new allocated Buffer

parameters.说明: Size of the Buffer instance to create, in bytes.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when fill is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Creates a Buffer instance of the specified size from the buffer pool, without initializing it. You need to use fill() to initialize the Buffer instance created. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } size - Size of the Buffer instance to create, in bytes.
@returns { Buffer } Return a new allocated Buffer

parameters.说明: Size of the Buffer instance to create, in bytes.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

注释信息: @param { number } size - Size of the Buffer instance to create, in bytes.
@returns { Buffer } Return a new allocated Buffer

parameters.说明: Size of the Buffer instance to create, in bytes.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the number of bytes of a string based on the encoding format. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string | Buffer | TypedArray | DataView | ArrayBuffer | SharedArrayBuffer } string - Target string.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format of the string. The default value is 'utf8'.
@returns { number } The number of bytes contained within `string`

parameters.类型: string | Buffer | TypedArray | DataView | ArrayBuffer | SharedArrayBuffer
parameters.说明: Target string.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format of the string. The default value is 'utf8'.

节点.return_description: The number of bytes contained within `string`

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Concatenates an array of Buffer instances of the specified length into a new instance. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Buffer[] | Uint8Array[] } list - Array of instances to concatenate.
@param { number } [totalLength] - Total length of bytes to be copied. The default value is 0.
@returns { Buffer } Return a new allocated Buffer
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "length" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= uint32 max. Received value is: [length]

parameters.说明: Array of instances to concatenate.
number } [totalLength] - Total length of bytes to be copied. The default value is 0.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The value of "length" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= uint32 max. Received value is: [length]

节点.功能描述: Allocates a new Buffer using an array of bytes in the range 0 – 255. Array entries outside that range will be truncated to fit into it. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { number[] } array - array array an array of bytes in the range 0 – 255
@returns { Buffer } Return a new allocated Buffer

parameters.说明: array array an array of bytes in the range 0 – 255

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: This creates a view of the ArrayBuffer without copying the underlying memory. SharedArrayBuffer, for example the .buffer property of a TypedArray. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types. It must be >= [left range] and <= [right range]. Received value is: [byteOffset/length]
注释信息: @param { ArrayBuffer | SharedArrayBuffer } arrayBuffer - arrayBuffer arrayBuffer An ArrayBuffer,
@param { number } [byteOffset] - byteOffset [byteOffset = 0] Index of first byte to expose
@param { number } [length] - length [length = arrayBuffer.byteLength - byteOffset] Number of bytes to expose
@returns { Buffer } Return a view of the ArrayBuffer
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "[byteOffset/length]" is out of range.

parameters.说明: arrayBuffer arrayBuffer An ArrayBuffer,
number } [length] - length [length = arrayBuffer.byteLength - byteOffset] Number of bytes to expose

节点.return_description: Return a view of the ArrayBuffer

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The value of "[byteOffset/length]" is out of range.

节点.功能描述: Copies the passed buffer data onto a new Buffer instance. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

@returns { Buffer } Return a new allocated Buffer

parameters.说明: buffer buffer An existing Buffer or Uint8Array from which to copy data

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

@param { Buffer | Uint8Array } buf2 - buf2 buf2 A Buffer or Uint8Array instance.

节点.功能描述: Fills this Buffer instance at the specified position. By default, data is filled cyclically. 1.Incorrect parameter types; 2.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string | Buffer | Uint8Array | number } value - Value to fill.
@param { number } [offset] - Offset to the start position in this Buffer instance where data is filled. The default value is 0.
@param { number } [end] - Offset to the end position in this Buffer instance (not inclusive). The default value is the length of this Buffer instance.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "[offset/end]" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= [right range]. Received value is: [offset/end]

parameters.说明: Value to fill.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.

error_codes.description: The value of "[offset/end]" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= [right range]. Received value is: [offset/end]
Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Compares buf with target and returns a number indicating whether buf comes before, after, or is the same as target in sort order. Comparison is based on the actual sequence of bytes in each Buffer. 1 is returned if target should come before buf when sorted. -1 is returned if target should come after buf when sorted. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types. It must be >= 0 and <= [right range]. Received value is: [targetStart/targetEnd/sourceStart/sourceEnd]
注释信息: @param { Buffer | Uint8Array } target - target target A Buffer or Uint8Array with which to compare buf
@param { number } [targetStart] - targetStart [targetStart = 0] The offset within target at which to begin comparison
@param { number } [targetEnd] - targetEnd [targetEnd = target.length] The offset within target at which to end comparison (not inclusive)
@param { number } [sourceStart] - sourceStart [sourceStart = 0] The offset within buf at which to begin comparison
@param { number } [sourceEnd] - sourceEnd [sourceEnd = buf.length] The offset within buf at which to end comparison (not inclusive)
@returns { -1 | 0 | 1 } 0 is returned if target is the same as buf
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "[targetStart/targetEnd/sourceStart/sourceEnd]" is out of range.

parameters.说明: target target A Buffer or Uint8Array with which to compare buf
number } [sourceEnd] - sourceEnd [sourceEnd = buf.length] The offset within buf at which to end comparison (not inclusive)

节点.return_description: 0 is returned if target is the same as buf

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The value of "[targetStart/targetEnd/sourceStart/sourceEnd]" is out of range.

节点.功能描述: Copies data at the specified position in this Buffer instance to the specified position in another Buffer instance. The default value is the length of this Buffer instance. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types. Received value is: [targetStart/sourceStart/sourceEnd]
注释信息: @param { Buffer | Uint8Array } target - Instance to which data is copied.
@param { number } [targetStart] - Offset to the start position in the target instance where data is copied. The default value is 0.
@param { number } [sourceStart] - Offset to the start position in this Buffer instance where data is copied. The default value is 0.
@param { number } [sourceEnd] - Offset to the end position in this Buffer instance (not inclusive).
@returns { number } The number of bytes copied
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "[targetStart/sourceStart/sourceEnd]" is out of range. It must be >= 0.

parameters.说明: Instance to which data is copied.
number } [sourceEnd] - Offset to the end position in this Buffer instance (not inclusive).

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The value of "[targetStart/sourceStart/sourceEnd]" is out of range. It must be >= 0.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether this Buffer instance is the same as another Buffer instance.
注释信息: @param { Uint8Array | Buffer } otherBuffer - Buffer instance to compare.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: Buffer instance to compare.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether this Buffer instance contains the specified value. Number of bytes to skip before starting to check data. If the offset is a negative number, data is checked from the end of the Buffer instance. The default value is 0. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string | number | Buffer | Uint8Array } value - Value to match.
@param { number } [byteOffset] - Number of bytes to skip before starting to check data.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.

parameters.说明: Value to match.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Obtains the index of the first occurrence of the specified value in this Buffer instance. If the offset is a negative number, data is checked from the end of the Buffer instance. The default value is 0. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string | number | Buffer | Uint8Array } value - Value to match.
@param { number } [byteOffset] - Number of bytes to skip before starting to check data.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.
@returns { number } The index of the first occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

parameters.说明: Value to match.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.

节点.return_description: The index of the first occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Creates and returns an iterator that contains the keys of this Buffer instance.
Creates and returns an iterator that contains the values of this Buffer instance.
Creates and returns an iterator that contains key-value pairs of this Buffer instance.

Obtains the index of the last occurrence of the specified value in this Buffer instance. If the offset is a negative number, data is checked from the end of the Buffer instance. The default value is the length of this Buffer instance. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string | number | Buffer | Uint8Array } value - Value to match.
@param { number } [byteOffset] - Number of bytes to skip before starting to check data.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.
@returns { number } The index of the last occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

parameters.说明: Value to match.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format (valid only when value is a string). The default value is 'utf8'.

节点.return_description: The index of the last occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

节点.功能描述: Reads the specified number of bytes from this Buffer instance at the specified offset, and interprets the result as a big-endian, two's complement signed value that supports up to 48 bits of precision. The default value is 0. The value range is [0, Buffer.length - byteLength]. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

Creates a Blob instance by copying specified data from this Blob instance.
